name: Retro Cruiser — Rebuild a Lost Phaser Game
summary: Recreate a Phaser 2.0.7 arcade shooter as a modern web game. The original source is lost; the model gets only the minified deployed bundle plus the original assets to reverse-engineer behavior from.

source.description: The deployed build of 'Retro Cruiser' from the author's blog: an index.html, a single minified index.min.js (the game with Phaser 2.0.7 bundled in, ~720KB), a phaser.map source map, CSS, and the full original asset set (images, audio in multiple formats, fonts). No un-minified game source exists.
